stories.title: **Kendall Wells Ties NCAA Freshman HR Record — OU Sweeps Kentucky**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells just tied the NCAA freshman home run record.

30 home runs. Tied with Lauren Chamberlain (2013), Jocelyn Alo (2018), and Kelly Majam (2010).

The record is right there. #Sooners

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
No. 3 Oklahoma swept Kentucky and Kendall Wells hit No. 30.

.383 BA. 60 RBIs. The nation's home run leader — tied for the all-time NCAA freshman record.

Red River Rivalry is next. #Sooners #Big12Softball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Ties NCAA Freshman Home Run Record at 30

stories.title: **Alabama Upsets No. 1 Texas — Takes Series 2-1 at Rhoads Stadium**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Alabama just beat No. 1 Texas and took the series.

Katie Stewart: 2 home runs in Game 3. Reese Atwood: another bomb. Alabama's first series win over a No. 1 since 2016.

Crimson Tide is a WCWS contender. #RollTide #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Texas drops the Alabama series 2-1.

The Longhorns' second series loss of the year. Red River Rivalry is one week away and Oklahoma is rolling at 38-3.

The race at the top just got wide open. #SECSoftball

article.headline: Alabama Stuns No. 1 Texas, Takes Series 2-1 at Rhoads Stadium

stories.title: **FSU Win Streak to 24 — Comeback Over Notre Dame in Series Sweep**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Down 4-0 to Notre Dame. FSU scored in four straight innings and won 8-4.

Win streak: 24 games. Nation's longest. 35-4 overall, 12-0 ACC.

The Noles are not stopping. #FSUSoftball #ACCSoftball

article.headline: FSU Rallies From 4-0 Down to Sweep Notre Dame, Win Streak Reaches 24

stories.title: **Red River Rivalry Preview — Texas vs. Oklahoma April 10-12 in Austin**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Mark your calendar.

Texas vs. Oklahoma — April 10-12 in Austin.

Game 1: Friday 6 PM CT on ESPN2. OU arrives 38-3 with Wells at 30 HRs. Texas just dropped the Alabama series.

This is the series of the year. #SECSoftball

stories.title: **LSU's Kylee Edwards Hits for the Cycle — First in Program History**

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kylee Edwards hit for the cycle — the first in LSU softball history.

HR. Single. Double. Triple. 4-for-6, 4 RBIs in LSU's 16-4 win over Missouri.

History made in Baton Rouge. #LSUSoftball #SECSoftball

stories.title: **Texas A&M Claims Series Over No. 11 Georgia 2-1**

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
No. 15 Texas A&M takes the series over No. 11 Georgia 2-1 — back-to-back series wins over the Bulldogs for the first time in program history.

Kennedy Powell. Sydney Lessentine. The Aggies are for real. #AggiesSoftball #SECSoftball

stories.title: **NFCA Week 9 Poll — Expect Major Reshuffling After Alabama's Upset**

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 9 poll drops Tuesday.

Alabama beat the No. 1 team. Oklahoma is 38-3. FSU won 24 straight. Texas dropped two series.

The rankings reshuffling is going to be wild. #SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball
